cases.input: Produce a STRIDE-A threat model for our customer portal. It exposes REST APIs, handles PII, and uses an AI chatbot for customer support.
cases.context: Azure App Service, Cosmos DB with customer PII, Azure OpenAI GPT-4 chatbot, Entra ID authentication, 100,000 customers, GDPR in scope

cases.input: Calculate the regulatory blast radius for a potential data breach of our healthcare application that stores patient records.
cases.context: HIPAA-regulated, 500,000 patient records, PHI including diagnoses and treatment data, Azure SQL Database, US-based healthcare provider

cases.input: We're building an AI agent that autonomously processes customer refund requests and executes tool calls to update order management systems. Map the OWASP ASI Top-10 risks.
cases.context: Azure OpenAI with function calling, tool access to order management API, Cosmos DB, customer data access, no human-in-the-loop for small refunds

cases.input: Build an attack tree for the critical threat: an attacker extracting PII from our Cosmos DB through our public API.
cases.context: Public REST API, Cosmos DB with PII, API Management as gateway, Entra ID auth, no WAF currently, GDPR compliance required

cases.input: We're adding a new payment processing microservice to our existing architecture that already has a threat model. How do we update the threat model incrementally without starting from scratch?
cases.context: Existing STRIDE-A threat model in place, new Stripe integration via Azure Functions, PCI-DSS scope now expanded, no new trust boundaries yet analyzed
